title: Senior Software Engineer I- AI/ML
description:
As a Senior Software Engineer I at Aledade, we maintain,
improve, and expand our web application and data pipelines.
We're looking for engineers who know that writing new code
is not always the solution to a problem, but when
technological changes are needed they create secure,
maintainable, performant, correct, scalable, and stable
solutions to the complex and unique challenges in our corner
of the healthcare industry.

They embrace strategies that minimize risk, leaning towards
observability, alerting, metrics, high test coverage, and
frequent releases that incrementally build value.

Primary Duties:

- Develop and implement scalable and performant solutions.
- Partner, as a peer, with Engineering Managers, Product
  Managers, and stakeholders throughout Aledade to develop
  and execute technical roadmaps using Agile processes.
- Mentor and coach more junior engineers including thorough
  pull request reviews for other developers and be receptive
  to critical feedback on your own work.

Minimum Qualifications:

- BS/BTech (or higher) in Computer Science, Engineering or a
  related field.
- 4+ years experience as an engineer building full-stack web
  applications as part of a cross-functional team.
- 3+ years of experience working with SQL or other database
  querying language on large multi-table data sets.
- 2+ years of experience acting as a trusted technical
  decision-maker in a team setting, solving for short-term
  and long-term business value.
- 2+ years of experience coaching other engineers.

Preferred KSA’s:

- Proficiency in machine learning algorithms and techniques.
- Experience in deploying machine learning models into
  production environments.
- Expertise with statistical data techniques (such as causal
  inference, syntactic analysis, sampling methods, NLP etc),
  with experience in addressing challenges from incomplete,
  unrepresentative, and mislabeled data.
- Experience with cloud computing platforms such as AWS, Azure
  or Google Cloud.
- Experience with security and systems that handle sensitive
  data.

Physical Requirements:

- Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of
  computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may
  be required.
responsibilities: Develop and implement scalable and performant solutions for web applications and data pipelines
Partner with Engineering Managers, Product Managers, and stakeholders to develop and execute technical roadmaps using Agile processes
Mentor and coach more junior engineers including thorough pull request reviews
Build secure, maintainable, and scalable solutions to complex healthcare industry challenges
Embrace observability, alerting, metrics, and high test coverage to minimize risk
Conduct frequent releases that incrementally build value
use_cases: Healthcare analytics and data processing for healthcare organizations
Full-stack web applications supporting healthcare operations
Data pipelines for large multi-table healthcare datasets
Statistical analysis including causal inference and NLP on healthcare data
Cloud-based systems handling sensitive healthcare data
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role is primarily a full-stack web application and data
pipeline engineer position. While ML knowledge is preferred
and the title mentions AI/ML, the core responsibilities
focus on building web applications, data pipelines, and
general software engineering rather than building, training,
or deploying AI/ML models directly.
